case_title: DING BAO SITU VS. MUNA JAMIL HAWATMEH

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PURSUANT TO CCP 1952, EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED AFTER 60 DAYS FROM THE FINAL DETERMINATION OF THIS CASE. YOU MAY PICK UP YOUR EXHIBITS AT THE SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION OR SEND SOMEONE WITH WRITTEN AUTHORIZATION TO PICK THEM UP. EXHIBITS WILL NOT BE MAILED.
